Note: Point Bonita Lighthouse brg NxE1/2E Mag 6 miles at 2030.
Nothing found brg NWxN Mag 15 miles
1600: West end of Attou Island brn NW1/2N. Highest peak of Aguttox Isln brg ESE.
Kamni Tri Brata brg N1/2W Mag 8 miles
1530: Sighted Brothers bearing N1/2W. Standing in to Entrance of Avatcha Bay.
1950: Took departure Petropavlosk Light house brn NxW1/2W distance 4 miles.
0600: Sighted Behring Island on starbd bow center of western part bearing E3/4N.
1600: Highest peak of Behring Island brn S1/4E distant between 15 & 18 miles. Lso high land brn NWxW.
1545: SE Cape brn S70W East Cape N5E. Passing St. Lawrence Isalnd distance 7 to 9 miles.
1800: NOrth Pinuk Island brn NW1/4N distance 3 miles
2400: At end of watch NE postion of St. Lawrence Isld brn WSW.
2250: Anchored in lee of Stuart Island.
0815: Anchored off NE end of Stuart Island.
0820: Headed NWxW1/4. Grounded. Bearing Egg Island N42E, SE Pt. Whale Isalnd S44W.
Egg Island (3) brg ENE Mag 5 miles at 1430.
1700: SW point of Stuart Isld brn SSW distance 8 miles. Course NNW.
Nothing found brg WSW Mag 1/2 mile
Mys Chaplina brg W Mag 21/2 miles
0000-0800: Waiting off Entrance to Plover Bay.
Noon: Standing along the coast for Plover Bay
Mys Chaplina brg WNW Mag 3 miles
2300: Cape Kriguygun rn NWxW distance about 6 miles.
0245: Heading in for St. Lawrence Bay.
0740: Cape Serge Kamen on port bow bearing West (Mag)
1100: Stood along the coast towards their village on course W1/2N.
1800: At 6 PM took departure Keluchin Island brn SSW (Mag) distance one mile. Set course WNW.
1845: Sighted Wrangel Land about 15 miles off.
8PM to Mid: Continued on to within 8 miles or nine miles of the land then headed course NNE.
2300: Hove to to wait for daylight.
0000-0200: Midnight to 2 AM ship hove to in ice.
0300: Course NNE. 0330: Wrangel Island in sight on port beam. At end of watch S end of land brn WSW1/2W, North End of land brn NW1/2W.
1815: At 6:15 stood along the Island to the East End to see if any cairn was left.
Nothing found N3/4E Nothing found NWxW Mag
Noon: At noon the Southern point of Wrangel Land brn WNW.
1700: Working under steam for Wrangel Island;
1430: At 2:30 got under way and stood into harbor under steam. 1400: Working in to Rodgers Bay.
1545: At 3:45 came to anchor in harbor.
0930: At 9:30 got under way and stood out of harbor.
Noon to 4PM: Standing along Wrangel Island to the Nd & Ed. Shifting course so as to keep about 3 miles of shore.
N end Herals Island N South end NExE Mag
0400: SW End Herald Island SE1/2S. NE End SE3/4S. (These bearings are too close together to get a good reading.)
Noon: Pillar Point bearing NNW 1/2 mile
0800: At 8 AM Wrangel Island brn as follows: viz:, Greatest Eastern end SExE. Western end SWxS.
1345: At 1345 Hove to off Herald Island.
2200: Steamed around eastern end of Herald Island, and at 10 came to off Eastern face of Herald Island.

0530: At 5:30 got under way & steamed around the Eastern end of Herald Island looking for Mr. Hunt and boat party. Mr. Waring was sent in a boat to the Westward on the same mission. At 6 A.M. sighted the missing boat coming around the North Eastern end of the Island & picked her up and then returned to the Sothward & picked up Mr. Waring.
0900: Picked up search party at 9 and steamed to Sd & Wd after relief boat and picked it up.
Noon to 4PM: Standing off and on awaiting party form shore.
8AM to Noon: Standing along the land from Cape Serdze Kamen to Lipeau Island.  (Idlidlja ?)
